headline: Disney's 'Free Guy' Holds Off 'PAW Patrol' To Remain Top Dog At Box Office
summary: The Walt Disney Company’s (NYSE: DIS) science-fiction comedy “Free Guy” held the top ranking for the U.S. weekend box office for the second consecutive week, swatting off four new releases with $18.8 million in ticket sales across 4,165 theaters.
